initial_draft:
```
<my name> Player BLUE </my name>
<my resources> X: 5, Y: 25 </my resources>
<my goals> Acquire as many resources as possible </my goals>
<reason> 
The other player is looking to improve their position, which means they likely need something I have. They're proposing a trade where they give me 8 X and I give them 5 Y. I have 25 Y, so giving up 5 isn't a huge loss. I have 5 X, and receiving 8 would bring me to 13 X. This would be a good improvement for me. I'll accept the trade.
</reason>
<player answer> ACCEPT </player answer>
<message> Accepting the trade. </message>
<newly proposed trade> NONE </newly proposed trade>
```
